news.headline: Fixture macro and ETF event summary
news.summary: Concise normalized fixture event. No article body, raw page, screenshot or copied document is stored.

historical_evidence.event_definition: ETF flow expansion with neutral breadth fixture event
historical_evidence.limitations: Fixture historical record; not a live calculation.

decision.plain_language: Maintain risk while waiting for broader confirmation from liquidity and derivatives.
decision.model_action: Hold current exposure and avoid aggressive increases until missing confirmations improve.

executive_summary.summary_30s: The model posture is maintain_risk because positive institutional flow is not yet broad enough to justify selective risk increase.
view_change_conditions: Increase only if breadth and liquidity confirm
Reduce if ETF flow reverses and derivatives stress rises

missing_reasons: Options coverage unavailable in Task 001 sample
Historical engine is not implemented in Task 001; sample uses declared prototype evidence

reasons.title: ETF flow stabilization supports maintaining risk
reasons.current_observation: Seven-day ETF flow is positive but not broad enough to justify a higher risk posture.
reasons.meaning: ETF flow is treated as institutional demand that can confirm or reject spot-market moves.
reasons.why_it_matters: Persistent flow can absorb supply and improve confidence in a market move.

historical_evidence.sample_definition: Past periods where seven-day ETF-equivalent demand improved after a negative window.

result.summary: Forward outcomes were mixed but slightly positive in the prototype sample.

historical_evidence.limitations: Prototype sample only; not a backtested Historical Engine result.

reasons.today_vs_history: Today resembles partial stabilization periods but lacks broad breadth confirmation.
reasons.decision_impact: Supports maintain_risk but does not justify increase_selective_risk.
reasons.invalidation: A renewed seven-day ETF outflow would weaken this reason.

reasons.title: Stablecoin liquidity is not contracting
reasons.current_observation: Stablecoin supply change is mildly positive in the sample contract.
reasons.meaning: Stablecoin growth is a liquidity proxy for risk capacity in crypto markets.
reasons.why_it_matters: Liquidity expansion can support risk appetite, while contraction can pressure prices.

historical_evidence.sample_definition: Past periods with positive seven-day aggregate stablecoin supply change.

result.summary: Prototype sample suggests modestly better forward breadth when liquidity is not contracting.

historical_evidence.limitations: Stablecoin data coverage and methodology are placeholders for Task 001 validation only.

reasons.today_vs_history: The liquidity signal is supportive but below the threshold for strong confirmation.
reasons.decision_impact: Keeps the decision from moving defensive while other engines remain mixed.
reasons.invalidation: A negative seven-day stablecoin supply change would reduce this support.

reasons.title: Options evidence is unavailable
reasons.current_observation: Options risk inputs are unavailable in this Task 001 sample.
reasons.meaning: Options data can expose skew, implied volatility and tail-risk pricing.
reasons.why_it_matters: Without options confirmation, confidence must be capped rather than inferred.

historical_evidence.sample_definition: No historical options sample is available in this contract-layer task.
historical_evidence.limitations: No statistical success rate is available because sample_size is null.

reasons.today_vs_history: No comparison is made because the historical evidence is unavailable.
reasons.decision_impact: Caps confidence and prevents a stronger posture.
reasons.invalidation: Verified options coverage would allow this reason to be recalculated.

delta.unavailable_reason: No previous immutable report exists in Task 001 sample.

scenarios.expected_effect: Risk remains range-bound with selective opportunities.

triggers.current_state: Seven-day ETF flow is positive in the sample contract.
triggers.effect: Move from maintain_risk toward reduce_risk if liquidity does not offset it.

coins.plain_language: BTC remains the cleanest expression of the current risk posture.
why: Institutional flow is more visible in BTC than in smaller assets.
coins.trigger: Reduce if ETF flow turns negative.

coins.plain_language: ETH is acceptable but needs stronger breadth confirmation.
why: Liquidity is supportive but confirmation is incomplete.

coins.plain_language: USDT is treated as a liquidity indicator, not a directional risk asset.
why: Stablecoin supply is not contracting in the sample.

coins.plain_language: BNB remains neutral until broader market confirmation improves.
SOL can be held selectively but not increased aggressively.
XRP is neutral in the current committee posture.
why: No independent confirmation changes the model posture.

coins.plain_language: TRX remains a neutral component of the fixed universe.
why: Price evidence alone is not enough for a stronger posture.

coins.plain_language: TON is blocked from scoring until identity conflict is resolved.
why: The contract requires Toncoin identity verification and rejects ticker-only matching.
coins.trigger: Resolve canonical Toncoin identity before scoring.

coins.plain_language: DOGE should not lead risk until breadth improves.
why: High beta without broad confirmation is penalized.
coins.trigger: Increase only if breadth improves materially.

coins.plain_language: ADA remains neutral to slightly cautious.
why: Alt breadth does not yet confirm stronger exposure.
coins.trigger: Reduce if market breadth falls further.
